entries.message: ✅ Spec / requirements or stated claim present — No committed spec file — judging against the PR description as the requirements/claim.
⚠️ Implementation plan artifact present — No implementation-plan artifact associated with this PR (none in its diff or description). Advisory only — adherence is not checked without one.
✅ Code adheres to the spec — The diff adheres to the spec by replacing the old first-N LogRateLimiter with a unified random LogSampler covering request, access, and diagnostic sampling dimensions.
